name: auth-service
description: Authentication service with JWT and role-based access control

scripts.test:integration: docker-compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up -d && sleep 10 && DB_HOST=localhost DB_PORT=5434 DB_USER=postgres DB_PASSWORD=postgres DB_NAME=test_db jest __tests__/integration.test.js --detectOpenHandles --forceExit; docker-compose -f docker-compose.test.yml down
